card.name: Powerbomb
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Powerbomb, tap an untapped creature you control. Destroy each other nonland permanent with mana value X or less, where X is the tapped creature's power.

card.name: Gokuaku, Primitive Isle
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) Gokuaku, Primitive Isle enters the battlefield tapped. {GU}{GU}{GU}{GU}{GU}, {T}, Exile Gokuaku: Create a tapped token that's a copy of target creature you control. It enters the battlefield with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Shohei Inoki, Opportunist
card.text: Affinity for monsters (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each monster you control.) Monsters you control get +2/+2 and have trample and "Whenever this creature attacks, you draw a card and you lose 1 life."

card.name: Bioblaster
card.text: ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source. This card's mana value is 2.) First strike

card.name: Lepidopteron
card.text: Flying Apex — {5}{WU}{WU}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Lepidopteron. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Bounty Chaser
card.text: When Bounty Chaser enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Deathzilla
card.text: Double strike Apex — {3}{W}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Deathzilla. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Elite Responder
card.text: Flying When Elite Responder dies, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Ascendant Harrier
card.text: Affinity for Plains (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Plains you control.) Flying

card.name: Puncturing Light
card.text: Destroy target attacking or blocking creature with power 3 or less.

card.name: Titanic Turmoil
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Each player who controlled a monster destroyed this way creates a 5/5 green Beast creature token. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Crisis Navigator
card.text: Whenever you activate an apex ability, put a +1/+1 counter on Crisis Navigator.

card.name: Rockroach
card.text: Vigilance {1}{W}: Return Rockroach from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Pterocetacean
card.text: Flying, vigilance Apex — {6}{W}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Pterocetacean. Destroy target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Incident Supervisor
card.text: Double strike Incident Supervisor gets +3/+0 as long as you control three or more other creatures with power 5 or greater.

card.name: Industrial Operative
card.text: Industrial Operative can't be blocked by monsters. (Monsters are creatures with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.) {2}, Sacrifice Industrial Operative: Draw a card.

card.name: Transdimensional Temp
card.text: Vigilance Apex — {3}{U}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a flying counter on Transdimensional Temp. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Silver Gharial
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Ascendant Snapper
card.text: Affinity for Islands (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Island you control.) Vigilance

card.name: Fairly Secure Confinement
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1 and "Apex—{12}: Destroy all Auras attached to this creature." (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Electroscopic Containment
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of bottom of their library or into their library second from the top. Draw a card.

card.name: Doomscuttler
card.text: Affinity for monsters (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each monster you control.) When Doomscuttler enters the battlefield, if it was cast, draw three cards.

card.name: Professor Penguin
card.text: When Professor Penguin deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Apex — {5}{U}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Professor Penguin. Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: It Came From the Sea
card.text: As an additional cost to cast It Came From the Sea, you may pay {V}. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.) Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If the additional cost was paid, draw a card.

card.name: Thirst for Power
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a monster card. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Gnawthrasher
card.text: ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source. This card's mana value is 2.) Menace

card.name: Pleatherback
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Apex — {6}{B}: Put two +1/+1 counters on Pleatherback. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Licensed Professional
card.text: When Licensed Professional dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Ascendant Predator
card.text: Affinity for Swamps (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Swamp you control.) Menace

card.name: Sense of Scale
card.text: Destroy target non-monster creature. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Mortal Blow
card.text: Target creature gets +2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Feed the Beast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Feed the Beast, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards. If the sacrificed creature was a monster, create two Treasure tokens. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater. A Treasure token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Dubious Ethics
card.text: All creatures get -5/-5 until end of turn.

card.name: Gravestomper
card.text: When Gravestomper enters the battlefield or dies, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Slavering Yambag
card.text: When Slavering Yambag enters the battlefield, each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. Whenever a creature you control dies, add {B}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Cut Down
card.text: Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 5 or less.

card.name: Overcome Extinction
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's a monster, put a +1/+1 counter on it. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Ornery Volcanape
card.text: Reach When Ornery Volcanape enters the battlefield, if you control a monster, create a Treasure token. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater. A Treasure token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Wriggeeler
card.text: Haste When Wriggeeler enters the battlefield, creature a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Ascendant Scuttler
card.text: Affinity for Mountains (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Mountain you control.) Haste

card.name: Trod Upon
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Trod Upon, you may pay {V}{V}. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.) Trod Upon deals 2 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle. It deals 5 damage instead if the additional cost was paid.

card.name: Tear to Shreds
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Tear to Shreds deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Lazarus Operative
card.text: {V}{V}{V}: Create a 3/3 red Dinosaur creature token. Activate only as a sorcery. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.)

card.name: Pensive Deathzilla
card.text: When Pensive Deathzilla dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target. Apex — {6}{R}{R}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Pensive Deathzilla. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Burnodactyl
card.text: Flying Apex — {6}{R}{R}: Put two +1/+1 counters on Burnodactyl. It fight up to one target creature. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.) When Burnodactyl dies, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Pyroclasm
card.text: Pyroclasm deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Captive Research
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. If it isn't a monster, create a Treasure token. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater. A Treasure token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Ascendant Demolisher
card.text: Affinity for Forests (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Forest you control.) Trample

card.name: Plated Goliath
card.text: Affinity for monsters (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each monster you control.) Trample

card.name: Titanic Smash
card.text: Titanic Smash costs {1} less to cast if it targets a monster. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.) Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Bugazord Egg
card.text: Each monster you control enters the battlefield with an additional +1/+1 counter on it. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.) {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Gigantic
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield with an additional X +1/+1 counters on it, then shuffle.

card.name: Gutmuncher
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card if you control the creature with the greatest toughness or tied for the greatest toughness.

card.name: Wistful Bioengineer
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell.

card.name: Monster Mash
card.text: Create two 5/5 green Beast creature tokens.

card.name: Sudden Bigness
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target noncreature, nonland permanent. • Put four +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Loping Grabberoid
card.text: Apex abilities of other permanents you control cost {1} less to activate. Apex — {4}{W}{U}: Draw two cards. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Incubation Shell
card.text: Affinity for creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.) {T}, Sacrifice Incubation Shell: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Frazzled Researcher
card.text: When Frazzled Researcher enters the battlefield and whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Furious Gorillion
card.text: As long as you control a monster, you may pay {G}{G} rather than pay Furious Gorillion's mana cost. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Primal Alpha
card.text: Trample Apex — {6}{G}{W}: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Crisis Resolver
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Crisis Resolver. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Dimensional Shifter
card.text: {2}: Until end of turn, target creature you control assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Gelatin Glider
card.text: Flying, vigilance {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Specimen Wrangler
card.text: Whenever Specimen Wrangler deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") {V}: Specimen Wrangler can't be blocked this turn. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.)

card.name: Hyperevolved Artillerist
card.text: During your turn, other creatures you control get +2/+0.

card.name: Experimental Botanist
card.text: First strike Whenever you activate an apex ability, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Basal Churner
card.text: Menace Apex — {10}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Basal Churner. The next apex ability you activate this turn costs {0} to activate. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Chitinous Skulker
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Chitinous Skulker, pay {V}{V}. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.) Chitinous Skulker can't be blocked except by monsters. (Monsters are creatures with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Steelscale Prototype
card.text: Steelscale Prototype can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Steelscale Prototype gets +1/+1 for each other monster you control. (A monster is a creature with power, toughness, or mana value 5 or greater.)

card.name: Bayou Tyrant
card.text: Bayou Tyrant enters the battlefield with two +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature, you may create that many 1/1 green Saproling creature tokens. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Improper Procedure
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. You may activate one of its abilities this turn by paying {0} rather than its activation cost.

card.name: Kaiju Hunter
card.text: Whenever Kaiju Hunter attacks, it gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the greatest toughness among other creatures you control.

card.name: Inoki Operative
card.text: {V}{V}{V}: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.)

card.name: Proprietary Technosaur
card.text: Menace, reach Lands you control have "{T}, Tap an untapped land you control: Create a Treasure token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Technomechanicus
card.text: Ward—Tap an untapped creature you control. Whenever Technomechanicus or another creature you control with power 5 or greater attacks, Technomechanicus deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Feline Ronin
card.text: When Feline Ronin enters the battlefield or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Mass-Produced Monster
card.text: Mass-Produced Monster can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Ascendant Enforcer
card.text: Affinity for basic lands (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each basic land you control.)

card.name: Miniature Annihilator
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Apex — {10}, {T}: Destroy target nonland permanent. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Exobiological Remnant
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {V}{V}, {T}: Draw a card. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.)

card.name: Innocuous Device
card.text: When Innocuous Device enters the battlefield, you may search your library for a card with a basic land type, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice Innocuous Device: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Powerbomb
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Powerbomb, tap an untapped creature you control. Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value X or less, where X is the tapped creature's power.

card.name: GNT Draft Archetypes GNT
card.text: {W}{U} APEX CONTROL Get big. Sink your mana into game-changing apex abilities. {U}{B} APEX SACRIFICE The bigger they all, the more you take advantage of their fall. {B}{R} FOSSIL AGGRO Use nonland mana to race ahead of the curse aggressively. {R}{G} FOSSIL STOMPY Fossil mana fuels your beatdown as you outsize your foe. {G}{W} COUNTERS If big isn't big enough, +1/+1 counters can make it bigger. {W}{B} APEX GRIND Let your smaller creatures die to advance the mad science of your apex beasts. {B}{G} MONSTER TOUGHNESS Your monsters care specifically about toughness 5 or greater. {G}{U} FOSSIL RAMP Get big mana. Spend big mana. Fossil costs are a breeze with your varied mana sources. {U}{R} FOSSIL TEMPO Stay one step ahead of the game with cutting-edge mana sources saving you on costs. {R}{W} MONSTER POWER Big power. Bigger power, even. Power 5 and up is all you need.

card.name: Shipwrecker Spawn
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} Apex — {X}{X}{U}: Draw X cards. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Chitinous Pummeler
card.text: Menace Apex — {7}{R}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Chitinous Pummeler. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.)

card.name: Territorial Orcasaur
card.text: When Territorial Orcasaur enters the battlefield, draw a card. {2}{V}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Territorial Orcasaur. ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source.)

card.name: Hell's Shell
card.text: Apex — {8}{G}{G}: Put six +1/+1 counters on Hell's Shell. (Activate only once. This costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents put into graveyards from the battlefield this turn.) Trample

card.name: Ux-Ang, Exobiologist
card.text: [+2]: You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast creature spells this turn. [0]: Create a 1/1 colorless Sliver creature token. [-7]: Search your library for a legendary creature card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Treasure GNT
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Idyllic Beachfront
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) Idyllic Beachfront enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Contaminated Aquifer
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) Contaminated Aquifer enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Geothermal Bog
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) Geothermal Bog enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Wooded Ridgeline
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) Wooded Ridgeline enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Radiant Grove
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) Radiant Grove enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Steam Vents
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) As Steam Vents enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Sacred Foundry
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) As Sacred Foundry enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) As Breeding Pool enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Overgrown Tomb
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) As Overgrown Tomb enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Godless Shrine
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) As Godless Shrine enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Deepsquirmer
card.text: ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source. This card's mana value is 3.) Flying

card.name: Studbasher
card.text: ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source. This card's mana value is 3.) Haste

card.name: Snapraptor
card.text: ({V} can be paid with {2} or with one mana from a nonland source. This card's mana value is 2.) Snapraptor can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.
